channel.title: codes.gallery
channel.description: Updates from codes.gallery — coded exhibition work, archive releases, and structure-in-formation.

item.title: codes.gallery launch surface
item.description: The main codes.gallery page presents the current coded exhibition direction: original ideas, rendered in code.

item.title: Harness Loop added to archive
item.description: Archive entry for Harness Loop, an early signal object within the OS:AI Framework, is available on the archive page.
